packs.name: United Kingdom Offline Maps
packs.description: Offline maps for United Kingdom. Install pulls a Protomaps/OSM PMTiles extract online (max zoom 12), then works offline. Licence: ODbL — © OpenStreetMap contributors.

packs.name: United States Offline Maps
packs.description: Offline maps for United States. Install pulls a Protomaps/OSM PMTiles extract online (max zoom 11), then works offline. Licence: ODbL — © OpenStreetMap contributors.
packs.size_warning: US at z11 is multi-GB. Raise ATLAS_PMTILES_MAXZOOM only with free disk (each level ~2×).

packs.name: Canada Offline Maps
packs.description: Offline maps for Canada. Install pulls a Protomaps/OSM PMTiles extract online (max zoom 11), then works offline. Licence: ODbL — © OpenStreetMap contributors.
packs.size_warning: Canada at z11 is multi-GB. Opt-in higher zoom with ATLAS_PMTILES_MAXZOOM.

packs.name: Ireland Offline Maps
packs.description: Offline maps for Ireland. Install pulls a Protomaps/OSM PMTiles extract online (max zoom 13), then works offline. Licence: ODbL — © OpenStreetMap contributors.

packs.size_warning: Australia tiles may be multi-GB at zoom 11. Ensure free disk before installing. Raise zoom only via ATLAS_PMTILES_MAXZOOM.

packs.name: Starter Models (qwen3:4b + nomic-embed-text)
packs.description: Offline import of chat and embedding models.

packs.name: Kids Home Learning
packs.description: Starter home-learning curriculum (maths, reading, science, geography, routine) indexed for local AI tutors. Install also pulls the pinned expand bundle when present.

expand_fetch.note: Pinned expand ships on-device; override with ATLAS_KIDS_EXPAND_URL

packs.name: Khan Academy (English - US curriculum)
packs.description: Kolibri channel pack with locked Studio ID c9d7f950ab6b5a1199e3d6c10d7f0103. Install from Education for one-click prepare + open Kolibri / USB import. Channel media is not bundled in the core ISO.
packs.licence_note: Khan Academy via Learning Equality Kolibri Studio — operator may import; not redistributed in Atlas ISO
packs.size_warning: Khan Academy EN US is ~63 GB of Kolibri channel media. Atlas ships only the locked channel ID — import online or from USB.

packs.name: CK-12 (K-12)
packs.description: Kolibri channel pack with locked Studio ID 1d8f6d84618153c18c695d85074952a7. Install from Education for one-click prepare + open Kolibri / USB import. Channel media is not bundled in the core ISO.
packs.licence_note: CK-12 Foundation via Kolibri Studio — operator import; review CK-12 terms for commercial OEM
packs.size_warning: CK-12 is ~6.6 GB. Atlas ships the locked channel ID only — import via Kolibri.

packs.name: Inclusive Home Learning Activities
packs.description: Kolibri channel pack with locked Studio ID 378cf4128c854c2795c100b5aca7a3ed. Install from Education for one-click prepare + open Kolibri / USB import. Channel media is not bundled in the core ISO.
packs.licence_note: Public Kolibri Studio channel (~52 MB) — operator import; not vendored in git

packs.name: Wikipedia EN starter (curated + top-100)
packs.description: Curated Wikipedia articles for agent RAG, plus install-time download of English top-100 nopic ZIM (~13 MB) for Kiwix. For full dumps install mini / nopic / maxi.
packs.licence_note: CC BY-SA 4.0 / GFDL — © Wikipedia contributors (Kiwix ZIM)

packs.name: Wikipedia EN mini
packs.description: Full English Wikipedia mini ZIM (~12 GB) for Kiwix. Large download — confirm free disk before install.
packs.licence_note: CC BY-SA 4.0 / GFDL — © Wikipedia contributors (Kiwix ZIM)
packs.size_warning: English Wikipedia mini is ~12 GB. Ensure free disk before installing.

packs.name: Wikipedia EN nopic
packs.description: Full English Wikipedia without pictures (~49 GB) for Kiwix. Large download — confirm free disk before install.
packs.licence_note: CC BY-SA 4.0 / GFDL — © Wikipedia contributors (Kiwix ZIM)
packs.size_warning: English Wikipedia nopic is ~49 GB. Ensure free disk before installing.

packs.name: Wikipedia EN maxi
packs.description: Full English Wikipedia with media (~115 GB) for Kiwix. Very large download — confirm free disk / external storage before install.
packs.licence_note: CC BY-SA 4.0 / GFDL — © Wikipedia contributors (Kiwix ZIM)
packs.size_warning: English Wikipedia maxi is ~115 GB. Prefer external SSD / OEM preload; ensure free disk before installing.

packs.name: Medical / first aid (EN)
packs.description: English Wikipedia medicine mini ZIM (~155 MB) for Atlas Library (Kiwix). Offline medical and first-aid reference.
packs.licence_note: CC BY-SA 4.0 / GFDL — © Wikipedia contributors (medicine ZIM via Kiwix)

packs.name: DIY repair / how-to (iFixit EN)
packs.description: iFixit English repair guides ZIM (~3.3 GB) for Atlas Library. Large download — confirm free disk before install.
packs.licence_note: iFixit content via Kiwix ZIM — see iFixit licensing
packs.size_warning: iFixit English is ~3.3 GB. Ensure free disk before installing.

packs.name: Project Gutenberg books (EN literature)
packs.description: Project Gutenberg English literature slice (LCC PN, ~3 GB) for Atlas Library. Full English Gutenberg (~206 GB) is OEM/external only.
packs.licence_note: Public domain / Project Gutenberg — offline ZIM via Kiwix
packs.size_warning: Gutenberg literature slice is ~3 GB. Full English collection is ~206 GB (not a default SKU).
